plan.failureSummary: The test failed in DETERMINISTIC mode because it attempted to click a dismissal button ('×') that was not present on the page.
observedIndicators: Deterministic mode used cached instructions containing a '×' button click.
Failure screenshot shows no modal or '×' button present.
Historical pattern of alternating success and quick failures suggests cache staleness.
Quick failure (8s) compared to successful runs (70s+).

remediationSteps.details: Execute the test again with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive enabled. This will force the autonomous agent to re-map the page and avoid the non-existent dismissal button.

remediationSteps.summary: Review handling of transient UI elements.
remediationSteps.details: If the '×' button is a cookie banner that frequently appears/disappears, consider adding a specific 'Dismiss cookie banner if present' step or making the initial navigation more robust to transient UI elements.

plan.notes: The flow history shows a pattern of alternating 8-second failures and 80-second successes. This is a hallmark of stale cache in deterministic mode where the cached instructions include an interaction with a transient element (like a cookie banner or promo modal) that is no longer appearing. Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to re-evaluate the page and skip the unnecessary dismissal step.
